Video.summary: Carl Reiner and Melba Moore guest star on this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Melba Moore

Video.summary: Lynn Redgrave joins Carol in "A Dirty English Movie." In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Vicki try to hide a dog.
Video.title: Lynn Redgrave

Video.summary: The one-of-a-kind Dom DeLuise and the sultry Peggy Lee are Carol's guests for a night of sketches and songs.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peggy Lee, Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Steve Martin and Betty White catch a wave in the movie spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns as Carol's guest, highlighted by a dual role in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Dionne Warwick

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a psychiatrist trying to unlock the secret of Carol's crying, and Carol as Stella Toddler.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest star Nancy Dussault sings, while Mr. Tudball finds himself regretting his offer to pay for a funeral.
Video.title: Nancy Dussault

Video.summary: Pat Carroll and Jack Jones guest. Pat and Carol play competing actresses. Plus: "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Jack Jones

Video.summary: George Gobel joins Carol in a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess living in squalor in New York.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, George Gobel

Video.summary: Vincent Price and Eydie Gorme star. Features an encounter on an elevator & the movie spoof "House Of Terror."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Jack Klugman sings with Carol, while Tony takes part in a sketch as part of a tribute to Broadway.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Guests Rich Little & Eydie Gorme join in a tribute to Alfred Hitchcock! Also: Carol and Harvey play a couple.
Video.title: Rich Little, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Tonights guests are Tim Conway and Eydie Gorme!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Barbara McNair and Carol spoof a classic TV series with "I Try".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Casesar

Video.summary: Rock Hudson stars, appearing with Carol as husband and wife anchors, and as secretary Mrs. Wiggins' date.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Bernadette Peters guest. Featuring The Invisible Man's mother and a man who can get anything.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Anthony Newley

Video.summary: Carol's guests are Mickey Rooney and John Davidson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Carl Reiner appears in two sketches: as the husband of an accident-prone woman, and as a marriage counselor.
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Guests James Garner, George Carlin, and Ken Berry join the gang for an evening of can't-miss comedy.
Video.title: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Image.alt: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Carol's old friends Garry Moore and Durward Kirby visit for the holidays.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Tim Conway contributes in sketches as the Lone Ranger and as a man who lives a dog's life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters joins for a sketch about bratty kids. The Early Early Show presents "The Most Happy Stella."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: The third season finale "Family Show" features the cast of regulars at their very best.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jack Klugman plays a skeptical man annoyed by his sister-in-law's visiting date--a clairvoyant.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman

Video.summary: Funt & Mundane score a hit, leading to a performance. Also: Tim's "Oldest Man" character is completely at sea.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife plagued by her husband's gambling. Meanwhile, a touring star takes the stage.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin and Lana Turner guest. Gorshin does impressions, then joins Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Mickey Rooney and John Davidson guest. Davidson sings, Rooney stars in a Western, and Carol must choose.
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Jack Klugman & Tony Randall guest. Jack sings with Carol, while Tony appears in a tribute to Broadway sketch.
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Nanette Fabray star. Featuring Carol as a dowdy secretary, and the spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Features Harvey & Carol encounter a wishing well, and another installment of "The Family."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball tries to implement a fire safety program. Also: an oasis might be salvation for Harvey & Tim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and George Carlin guest! Lucy and Carol play flight attendants, and George serves up stand-up.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: John Byner & Petula Clark star. TV commercial spoofs and the firing of Donald Duck are on tap tonight.
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark
